opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My feet have been numb for weeks, but tonight the burning pain shot up my legs so badly I lost my balance in the dark and crashed into the wall. I'm on the floor now and I can't get myself up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The burning pain suddenly got much worse tonight, I fell in the dark, and I'm stuck on the floor in agony and too scared to try to stand.

symptom_narrative.onset: the numbness and tingling started in my toes about a month ago and has been creeping up; the bad burning pain came on suddenly tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: numbness for weeks, the severe burning pain for a few hours tonight
symptom_narrative.character: pins and needles and numbness in both feet, then a burning, shooting pain that ran up both legs
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the burning pain is unbearable, worse than anything I've had
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both feet and up both legs, same on each side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the numbness is there all the time; the burning came on suddenly and hasn't let up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — the paracetamol I take does absolutely nothing for it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to move or stand, and the cold floor makes my feet feel awful
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I can't really feel the floor under my feet so I feel really unsteady, especially in the dark; I banged into the wall when I fell
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the numbness has slowly been getting worse over the last few weeks but I've never had the burning pain or a fall like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm on the floor, I can't get up on my own, and I'm too scared to put weight on my legs

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: cancer — I just finished a course of chemotherapy

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live on my own, so there's no one here to help me up or keep an eye on me

objective_data_offered.value: patient is sitting on the hallway floor propped against the wall, guarding both legs, unwilling to stand
both feet feel numb and I can't feel the floor properly; they feel oversensitive and painful to the cold

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own estimate, not weighed today

objective_data_offered.value: the hallway light is dim and there are loose rugs on the floor
I didn't hit my head and I didn't black out — I just crashed into the wall and went down
